metrics_semantics.primary_values: downloads, first_time_downloads, impressions, product_page_views and taps are filtered to rows where Date == report_date.
metrics_semantics.total_available_values: *_total_available fields preserve the previous unfiltered aggregate across all rows returned by Apple Analytics.

positioning.goal: Vendre les apps et construire un revenu logiciel indépendant.
positioning.doctrine: Transformer l'expertise de production en apps macOS premium qui économisent du temps, réduisent les erreurs et rendent les workflows créatifs plus contrôlables.

localizations.promotional_text: Generate your music cue sheets and EDLs instantly from your Pro Tools sessions in just one click!
localizations.description:
Odile is the perfect companion tool for music editors, re-recording mixers, and all audio post-production professionals. Stop wasting hours manually logging timecodes: Odile connects directly to your open Pro Tools session to automatically generate clean, adjustable, and delivery-ready EDLs (Edit Decision Lists).

Thanks to its deep integration with the PTSL API, Odile analyzes your tracks and saves you precious time when delivering projects or filing copyright reports.

KEY FEATURES:

Seamless Pro Tools Integration
Odile communicates directly with Pro Tools. Select your tracks in your session, and the app automatically retrieves and analyzes the regions to build an exploitable chronological table.

Smart Region Analysis
The app intelligently ignores technical renders (like Audio Process Stream) and automatically merges generic clips (named mu, mus, etc.) with adjacent music cues to keep your list clean and accurate.

Advanced Timecode Management
View and adjust your in-points, out-points, and durations with absolute precision (HH:MM:SS:FF). You can even apply a global offset (+/-) to your entire list in just a few clicks.

Professional Editing & Exports

Interactive Table: Delete entries, edit content, and copy/paste directly within the cells.
Excel Export (.xlsx): Generate a comprehensive spreadsheet with a polished layout, including title/date blocks, frozen headers, and color-coding.
Clipboard (CSV): Copy the entire list in one click to paste it into an email or your own documents.
Bi-directional Sync (Markers)
Send data smartly from Odile's table back into your Pro Tools session by automatically creating Memory Locations (Markers) at the exact timecodes.

Odile naturally fits into demanding professional workflows. Spend less time on technical paperwork and more time doing what matters: the sound.

localizations.description:
FeedBacks is a standalone macOS app for turning mix feedback notes into timeline markers.
Key features:
• Import feedback from text files or clipboard
• Parse and preview feedback rows in-app
• Send selected markers directly into Pro Tools via embedded Python/PTSL
• Export markers to AAF for use in other DAWs, with selectable frame rate
• Customize the interface and marker display via a dedicated Colors window (cmd + shift + C)
localizations.keywords: Pro Tools, feedback, mix, audio, DAW, AAF, markers, import, music, timeline

analysis_instruction: Produire une réflexion stratégique longue seulement si les données le justifient: utiliser les valeurs primaires filtrées sur report_date pour tout diagnostic quotidien et toute comparaison; les champs *_total_available servent uniquement à l'audit de collecte. Lire freshness/report_date, history J-7/J-30, funnel_by_source, funnel_by_territory, sales/pricing, reviews, metadata, screenshot_inventory et quality_signals. Distinguer signal réel, bruit probable, hypothèse et donnée manquante. Avant toute recommandation produit, pricing, ASO, screenshots ou metadata, vérifier app.review_pipeline: si has_blocking_pipeline_change vaut true ou si une version est READY_FOR_REVIEW, WAITING_FOR_REVIEW, IN_REVIEW, PENDING_APPLE_RELEASE, PENDING_DEVELOPER_RELEASE, PROCESSING_FOR_APP_STORE ou WAITING_FOR_EXPORT_COMPLIANCE, traiter ces changements comme déjà engagés et proposer uniquement des actions compatibles.

review_pipeline_source.versions: App Store Connect appStoreVersions endpoint, best effort
review_pipeline_source.sensitive_fields: App Review contact, demo account and notes are redacted from committed JSON

pricing_sales_source.pricing: App Store Connect appPriceSchedule endpoint, best effort
pricing_sales_source.sales: App Store Connect salesReports DAILY SALES SUMMARY, best effort, preserving previous values when refresh is unavailable

market_intelligence_source.history: local reports/*.json raw App Store Analytics rows
market_intelligence_source.source_and_territory_funnels: local raw engagement/download rows grouped by Source Type and Territory
market_intelligence_source.reviews: App Store Connect customerReviews endpoint, best effort
market_intelligence_source.metadata: App Store Connect appInfos endpoint plus review_pipeline version localizations, best effort
market_intelligence_source.screenshots: App Store Connect appScreenshotSets endpoint via appStoreVersionLocalization ids, best effort
limitations: Sales source is not attributable to App Store discovery source.
Screenshot inventory stores counts and file metadata, not OCR or visual quality.
Customer review availability can vary by platform, territory, account permissions and review volume.
